profile: Otherworld Assassin (UR); AOE Execute / AOE Spell caster. All damage is Magic, delivered through her multi-hit Feat (4-6 Star Arrows) and a board-wide Ultimate; she stacks [Stellar Seal] and the [Eternal Night] field. Scales on ATK%, gains Crit Rate in Eternal Night, ignores DEF on Sealed targets, and wins by nuking + executing the whole enemy line. Wants AOE damage amps, True DMG (especially % current/max HP for execute), Final DMG, DEF-Ignore and ATK%; gains nothing from basic-attack, single-target, heal/support, bleed/infect-apply, or pure-defensive mirrors.

ranking.name: Horde-Assault
ranking.reason: Best-in-slot: 'AOE Skill additionally deals True DMG... distributed among all targets' is exactly her win-con — her Feat and Ultimate are both AOE, so this adds up to 400% ATK as True DMG every turn, ignoring DEF and Stellar Seal gating.

ranking.name: Nyx Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Her own themed mirror and pure execute synergy: 'Passively triggered AOE attack skills deal extra True DMG equal to % of target's current HP' — current-HP True DMG on her AOE hits is her AOE-Execute identity. Scales to 10% current HP, 3 triggers/turn at 5*.

ranking.name: Luna
ranking.reason: 'Damage dealt by Area Attacks increased by 10%->25%' — flat, unconditional AOE amp on a hero whose entire damage output is AOE Magic. Always-on, no setup.

ranking.name: Firmament
ranking.reason: Final DMG +12% base (best raw Final DMG mirror, anima), unconditional and multiplicative on top of her big AOE numbers; highest-floor stat amp she can run.

ranking.name: Baleful Omen
ranking.reason: Final DMG +5%->15% PLUS 'apply [Lethal]... preventing Soul Crystal resurrection' — an AOE executer's perfect partner: her nuke kills the whole board and Lethal stops them rezzing. 100% Lethal chance at 5*.

ranking.name: Throat-Slitting
ranking.reason: 'Gain 45% Final DMG at start of battle... resets to 45% after killing an enemy.' Front-loads her opening Ultimate nuke and resets on kills (she AOE-executes), keeping the bonus high. Strong but decays between kills.

ranking.name: Ananke Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Final DMG +5%->20%, +40% more and current-HP True DMG vs Damage-Share/Transfer enemies. Reliable Final DMG floor plus execute-flavored True DMG; conditional half needs enemy share states.

ranking.name: Wukong
ranking.reason: 'All attacks deal an additional 5%->20% of ATK as True DMG' — every one of her many AOE hits (4-6 arrows + Ultimate) gets flat True DMG, DEF-proof; great multi-hit synergy.

ranking.name: Royal Awe
ranking.reason: 'Repeatedly attacking same enemy within one turn, DMG +10%->60%' — her Feat fires 4-6 Star Arrows that can stack on hit targets, and her Awaken-4 adds a bonus hit; solid for her multi-hit pattern.

ranking.name: Michael
ranking.reason: Final DMG +6% per buff, up to 30% at 5*. In Eternal Night she carries Cosmic Robe stacks + ATK/Crit buffs, so the buff count is real; strong scaling Final DMG.

ranking.name: Wasteward
ranking.reason: 'Each attack increases Final DMG by 3%->5%, up to 50%' — her multi-hit Feat and Ultimate trigger it fast (basic-atk clause irrelevant; the 'each attack' half applies); high uptime Final DMG ramp.

ranking.name: Mister
ranking.reason: Flat ATK% — her Ultimate caps each target at 400% of ATK and Awaken/Genesis scale off ATK, so raw ATK% is universally useful, just a small number (5% at 5*).

ranking.name: Aurora
ranking.reason: DEF Ignore +5%->15%. She already ignores 20% DEF on Stellar-Sealed targets (Genesis III); stacking more DEF Ignore directly multiplies her Magic AOE on tanks.

ranking.name: Yin
ranking.reason: Final DMG +2%->5% — same clean unconditional amp as Firmament but epic-tier small numbers; fine filler while you lack the anima Final DMG mirrors.

ranking.name: Daisy
ranking.reason: Final DMG +5%->20% is great, but the [Hunt] crit-stacks self-destruct since she AOE-kills every turn (stacks removed on kill); she keeps mostly just the Final DMG half.

ranking.name: Adele
ranking.reason: BATK DMG +30% and basic-atk crit are wasted (she doesn't basic-attack), but in Eternal Night she has 20%+ Crit Rate and her Feat is multi-hit, so the crit-rate clause has marginal value. Mostly a dead mirror's stat-stick.

ranking.name: Vivi
ranking.reason: Crit Rate +2%->5%. She gains 20% Crit Rate in Eternal Night and her multi-hit Feat can crit, so crit rate is live but minor; low magnitude.

ranking.name: Aelia
ranking.reason: Crit DMG +2%->5%. Once she has crit (Awaken) her Feat crits benefit, but the bonus is small and she has no dedicated crit ramp; modest filler.

ranking.name: Renais
ranking.reason: B-tier stat-stick until 3*; the 3* on-kill 'launch a Basic Attack' is wasted (she has no basic-attack scaling and her output is skills), and the BATK DMG ramp does nothing for a caster. Only the small stats matter.

ranking.name: Rose
ranking.reason: At 3*+ it splits into '7% Final DMG when using Ultimate/Feat Skill' which DOES apply to her (she only casts skills) — ramping Final DMG up to 28%. Decent but slower to ramp than flat Final DMG mirrors; the basic-atk branch is dead.

ranking.name: Scale-Splitting
ranking.reason: Its True DMG keys entirely off Basic Attack, which Nyx never uses; the crit clause is also basic-attack-gated. Near-dead — only the flat stats apply.

ranking.name: Van Helsing
ranking.reason: Ultimate DMG Boost helps her opening nuke, but it's consumed after one Ultimate and the 3* growth clause is per-Basic-Attack (she has none). One-shot value only; far weaker than her Final/AOE amps.

ranking.name: Uncle Ying
ranking.reason: 'Increases Ultimate DMG by 8%->20%' — helps her Ultimate, but does nothing for her Feat (her main repeatable AOE) and is single-clause; narrow.

ranking.name: Lilith
ranking.reason: Keys off 'Single Skill Attack' True DMG per debuff — she's AOE, not single-target, so the trigger rarely fires on her kit despite the strong text; the 3* Infect clause needs Infect she doesn't apply.

ranking.name: Kira
ranking.reason: 'Single-target ATK DMG +20%' — pure anti-synergy: every Nyx skill is AOE, so this almost never applies.

ranking.name: Valendine
ranking.reason: 'When using Single Attack...' execute-style ramp, but she has no single-target attacks; trigger essentially never fires for an AOE caster.

ranking.name: Ada
ranking.reason: +DMG vs debuffed enemies is decent in theory (her Stellar Seal is a debuff), but it's ATK-DMG and she has no reliable extra debuff source beyond her own seal; weak fit, off-theme.

ranking.name: Arthur
ranking.reason: +DMG vs enemies with Control — Nyx applies no control, so unless a teammate CCs, this is dead. Off-role control mirror.

ranking.name: Night Depths
ranking.reason: True DMG that ramps off HER OWN HP loss; as a backline assassin nuking from full HP, she rarely loses enough HP to stack [Time Seal]. Wrong scaling lever.

ranking.name: Hinata Inori
ranking.reason: All value gated on 'when any ally dies' — a reactive survival/crit burst for a hero who wins by killing first; unreliable and off-theme for a fast AOE nuker.

ranking.name: Lincoln
ranking.reason: Crit DMG RED is a defensive/anti-crit stat with zero offensive value for her; off-role.

ranking.name: Tinplate
ranking.reason: Counterattack True DMG scaling off DEF — she's a 108-DEF glass assassin who isn't a damage sink; near-zero output.

ranking.name: Dark Tide
ranking.reason: HP% + DMG-when-HP-higher; she's a low-HP backliner, the conditional rarely holds and HP isn't her scaling stat.

ranking.name: Jacob
ranking.reason: HP-loss Final DMG/RED hybrid for a bruiser; she nukes from full HP so it barely activates, and the DR half is wasted on her offensive kit.

ranking.name: Isabella
ranking.reason: Final DMG +10% base is okay, but the big half needs enemies with [Shield], which she neither applies nor reliably faces; mostly the small flat Final DMG.

ranking.name: Nuwa Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Final DMG +5% flat is usable, but the bulk (extra Final DMG + Effect Resist) requires HER being in Damage Share state, which her kit never grants; defensive-flavored, off-fit.

ranking.name: Ling
ranking.reason: Strong True DMG but ONLY vs [Infect] targets — Nyx applies Stellar Seal, not Infect, so the trigger is dead without an Infect ally.

ranking.name: Lucifer
ranking.reason: Keys off attacking [DMG Over Time] targets; Nyx applies no DoT, so the True DMG and 3* Torment clause rarely fire from her own kit.

ranking.name: Mars Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: 'On each Feat Skill crit hit' — her Feat CAN crit in Eternal Night, so there's a sliver of fit, but it needs reliable crit she doesn't fully build, and the 3* half just restores Spirit Armor (defensive). Marginal.

ranking.name: Alucard
ranking.reason: Crit Rate/DMG stat-stick; she has only ~20% crit from Awaken with no crit-DMG investment, so a crit-only mirror underperforms her Final/AOE/True options. 3* buff-dispel is minor utility.

ranking.name: Gaia Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: AOE True DMG is on-theme, but it triggers on HER taking a lethal hit — a defensive death-rattle on a glass nuker who shouldn't be eating lethal hits. Wrong delivery.

ranking.name: Enchantress
ranking.reason: Fox Fire is an Effect-Hit/control debuff engine; Nyx isn't an effect-hit applier and gains little from the True-DMG-on-Fox-Fire loop. Off-role control mirror.

ranking.name: Bathory
ranking.reason: Effect Hit Rate — she has no debuffs that need landing beyond her guaranteed Stellar Seal, so effect-hit is wasted offense.

ranking.name: Sariel
ranking.reason: Reactive Infect-on-being-attacked — off-role, she's not a damage sink and applies no Infect synergy.

ranking.name: Sherry
ranking.reason: Bleed-stack amplifier; Nyx applies no Bleed, so it never triggers. Dead.

ranking.name: Ying Gou
ranking.reason: Infect-stack amplifier; Nyx applies no Infect, so it never triggers. Dead.

ranking.name: Azmodan
ranking.reason: Reactive Bleed-on-being-attacked — off-role defensive, no Bleed synergy in her kit.

ranking.name: Zhiming
ranking.reason: Final DMG RED — defensive stat with no offensive value for a nuker; off-role.

ranking.name: Garvin
ranking.reason: Final DMG RED, legendary — pure mitigation; irrelevant to her damage output.

ranking.name: Frostglow
ranking.reason: Final DMG RED +12%->30% — strong defensive anima but zero offense for her glass-cannon role.

ranking.name: Eternal Stand
ranking.reason: Stacking Final DMG RED on taking hits — defensive, off-role for a backline nuker.

ranking.name: Rock Elephant
ranking.reason: Big-hit excess-DMG reduction — tank survival tool, useless on her offensive kit.

ranking.name: Jeanne
ranking.reason: DMG-RED/heal/true-dmg gated on Damage-Share state she never enters; a tank/support mirror, fully off-role for Nyx.

ranking.name: Galos
ranking.reason: DEF% — neither her scaling stat nor her role; a tank stat on a 108-DEF assassin.

ranking.name: Frankenstein
ranking.reason: HP% (epic) — not her scaling stat; minimal offense, off-role for a glass nuker.

ranking.name: Albert
ranking.reason: HP% (legendary) — same as Frankenstein, bigger HP for a hero who doesn't scale on HP and shouldn't be tanking.

ranking.name: Titan Strength
ranking.reason: ATK/DEF while shielded + heal at 3*; she has no self-shield source, so the trigger never fires. Dead without a shield enabler.

ranking.name: Dracula
ranking.reason: HP% + Healing-Received scaling — a sustain/tank mirror with no offensive value for her.

ranking.name: Theresa
ranking.reason: Increases Heal — she has no heals to amplify; fully dead on a non-healer.

ranking.name: Heidi
ranking.reason: Buffs single-target Heal skills — Nyx casts none; completely dead.

ranking.name: Orpheus
ranking.reason: Lost-HP self-heal — pure sustain, no offense; she wins by killing fast, not grinding.

ranking.name: Raphael
ranking.reason: Effect Resist Rate — defensive resistance stat, no offensive synergy.

ranking.name: Alluring Gaze
ranking.reason: Effect Resist Rate (anima) — same defensive niche; nothing for her damage.

ranking.name: Elbera‘s Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Effect Resist + minor self-heal — defensive/sustain, fully off-role.

ranking.name: Venus
ranking.reason: DMG-RED support mirror (null text, dr params) — mitigation only, zero offense for a nuker.

ranking.name: Mystic Bull
ranking.reason: Grants allies shields at battle start — team-support, no personal offense; off-role.

ranking.name: Warding Blessing
ranking.reason: On-death Spirit Shield for allies — death-rattle support; provides her no damage and she shouldn't be dying first. Off-role.

ranking.name: Flame Dawn
ranking.reason: Self-revive — pure survival insurance, no offensive contribution; a defensive crutch, not a damage slot.

ranking.name: Elegy
ranking.reason: Crit-triggered Healing-Received reduction — anti-heal utility with negligible offense; off-theme control mirror.
